authselect-test-framework
  • Core concepts

Core concepts

The authselect test framework is a minimal fork of sssd-test-framework used by authselect system tests.

It provides:

  • Profiles — predefined multihost topologies for authselect profiles (Profile)

  • Roles — client, IPA and Samba hosts with a Python API for test setup

  • Utilities — authselect, SSSD, winbind, oddjob, PAM, authentication and local user helpers

Tests are written with pytest, the pytest-mh plugin and this framework. Each test that needs remote hosts is marked with @pytest.mark.topology using one of the predefined profiles.
